content.full_text:
State of California

Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 • • • 1100 K STREET BUILDING, SACRAMENTO, 95814

December 29, 1976


Mr. Ronald R. Gastelum
Deputy General Counsel
Metropolitan Water District
of Southern California
1111 Sunset Boulevard
Post Office Box 54153
Los Angeles, California   90054

Dear Mr. Gastelum:

     You asked whether the Commission has defined "brokerage
services" for purposes of Government Code §87207(b)(2).  The
answer is "no".  The Commission has handled such questions
on a case-by-case basis, and it is the staff's view that
informal advice should be provided on the same basis.

     If you have questions regarding specific kinds of busi-
ness services which prove troublesome in terms of the "brok-
erage services" standard of Government Code §87207(b)(2),
please feel free to request our advice regarding the specific
fact situations.

     I regret that I could not be more informative with
respect to this matter.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        [signature]
                                        Delbert L. Spurlock, Jr., Chief
                                        Conflicts of Interest Division

DLS:glb


TECHNICAL ASSISTANCE ADMINISTRATION (916) 322-5660 • EXECUTIVE/LEGAL 322 5901 • ENFORCEMENT CONFLICT OF INTEREST 322-6441

The image appears to be almost entirely blank or extremely faded, with only a few barely visible marks or artifacts at the very top of the page. The content is not legible enough to transcribe with accuracy.

The Metropolitan Water District of Southern California

Office of General Counsel                                    December 10, 1976




Mr. Delbert Spurlock
Chief, Conflict of Interest Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, California  95804

Dear Mr. Spurlock:

     Since we are approaching the effective date of
Metropolitan's Conflict of Interest and Disclosure of
Personal Finances Code, we would appreciate your advising
us whether the Commission has defined "brokerage services"
for purposes of Government Code Section 87207(b)(2). If
the Commission has not adopted a definition, would you
please inform us of the staff's interpretation of "broker-
age services".

     Thank you for your continuing assistance.

                                        Very truly yours,

                                        Robert P. Will
                                        General Counsel

                                        [signature]
                                        Ronald R. Gastelum
                                        Deputy General Counsel




1111 Sunset Boulevard, Los Angeles, Calif. / Mailing address: Box 54153, Los Angeles, Calif. 90054 / Telephone: (213) 626-4282

I can see this image appears to be almost entirely blank or very faintly printed, with only a few barely visible marks at the top of the page. The content is too faint or unclear for me to reliably transcribe any specific text.

If you have a clearer version of this document, please share it and I'll be happy to provide an accurate transcription following your rules.
